questions.question: Do I need to install anything to start?
questions.answer: No installation needed! Everything works right in your browser. Just sign up and start solving challenges immediately.

questions.question: Is Tandem really free?
questions.answer: Yes! All challenges are completely free, including basic progress tracking and access to the global leaderboard.

questions.question: What topics are covered?
questions.answer: We cover JavaScript (closures, event loop, promises) at the moment but new topics added regularly!

questions.question: How is the AI interviewer different from just practicing questions?
questions.answer: Our AI doesn't just read questions - it adapts to your answers, asks follow-up questions and gives detailed feedback, just like a real interviewer. You'll face realistic scenarios that prepare you for the real thing.

questions.question: How does the leaderboard work?
questions.answer: Every solved widget earns you points. Your total points determine your global ranking. Compete with thousands of developers worldwide and see your name rise as you improve.

questions.question: How much time do I need per day?
questions.answer: Just 15 minutes a day is enough to build momentum. Most users do 2-3 sessions per week, but you can go at your own pace.
